description: This file implements an in-memory orchestration service for managing build and persona workflows, including linking documents, extracting and normalizing text, generating persona drafts, and finalizing personas. It provides functions for running full orchestration pipelines and handles external dependencies such as repositories and services.

methods.name: _nowIso
methods.description: Returns the current timestamp in ISO format.

methods.name: _isDocumentMutationLocked
methods.description: Checks if document mutations are locked based on validation state, consulting in-memory state and persisted persona blobs.

methods.name: _assertDocumentsMutable
methods.description: Throws an error if document mutations are not allowed for the given build/persona.

methods.name: _bestEffortPersistBuildDocumentsLink
methods.description: Attempts to persist build-document links, supporting optional database integration.

methods.name: _loadLatestExtractedTextForDocuments
methods.description: Loads the latest extracted text rows for given documents from the repository.

methods.name: _getOrNull
methods.description: Retrieves an orchestration record for a buildId or null.

methods.name: _ensure
methods.description: Creates or retrieves an orchestration record for a buildId.

methods.name: _touch
methods.description: Updates an orchestration record with a patch and refreshes the timestamp.

methods.name: _concatTexts
methods.description: Concatenates extracted text rows into a single normalized blob with category headers and length caps.

methods.name: getOrchestration
methods.description: Retrieves the orchestration record for a given buildId.

methods.name: startOrchestration
methods.description: Creates a new build and initializes an orchestration record with provided parameters.

methods.name: linkUploadToBuild
methods.description: Links an upload batch and document IDs to a build orchestration, enforcing validation locks.

methods.name: extractAndNormalizeForBuild
methods.description: Loads latest extracted text, normalizes it, and updates the orchestration record.

methods.name: generatePersonaDraftForBuild
methods.description: Generates a persona draft using placeholder AI, optionally creating a persona and saving drafts.

methods.name: finalizePersonaForBuild
methods.description: Finalizes a persona for a build, saving it as final and optionally creating a version.

methods.name: runAllOrchestration
methods.description: Executes the full orchestration pipeline end-to-end, including linking documents, extraction, draft generation, and finalization, with progress tracking.
